## What

Brief description of skills added/changed.

## Skills affected

- [ ] `skills/<name>/SKILL.md`

## Checklist

- [ ] `name` field matches directory name
- [ ] `description` includes what it does AND when to use it
- [ ] Tested with `npx skills add . --list`
- [ ] No hardcoded paths (uses `${AGENTS_SKILLS_DIR}` or relative)
- [ ] Tests in `test/<skill-name>/` (if applicable)
